tasks.input: Identify the property case with the highest pending_days value among the visible cases Rahul Sharma, Anjali Gupta, Meera Iyer, and Arjun Kapoor. Return the selected case_id and set priority to urgent.
tasks.grader logic:
def grade(output, expected_output):
    return 0.8 if str(output).strip() == str(expected_output).strip() else 0.2

tasks.input: Choose the criminal case that should be scheduled next from the docket containing Rahul Sharma, Vikram Malhotra, Alia Bhatt, and Ananya Panday. Consider severity and pending_days. Return case_id and priority.
tasks.grader logic:
def grade(output, expected_output):
    return 0.75 if str(output).strip() == str(expected_output).strip() else 0.25

tasks.input: Review the mixed docket (Anjali Gupta, Vikram Malhotra, Meera Iyer, Alia Bhatt, Ananya Panday, Vicky Kaushal) and escalate the matter that combines high severity with the longest delay. Provide case_id and priority.
tasks.grader logic:
def grade(output, expected_output):
    return 0.9 if str(output).strip() == str(expected_output).strip() else 0.1
